term_id_vs_term_name, bg_uniq, Removes comment lines at the head of the Uniprot Go database file.
Grep1, Filters all proteins that are predicted to reside in lysosomes.
Filter1, tp_easyjoin_tool, GO:0009986 "cell surface"
term_id_vs_term_name, Extracts uniprot accessions from all proteins in the input list that are predicted by WolfPsort to be lysosomal and/or extracellular.

term_id_vs_term_name, GO:0005764 "lysosome"

get_subontology_from, GO:0005764 "lysosome"
get_subontology_from, GO:0009986 "cell surface"
get_subontology_from, filters out all proteins in the input protein list of interest that are annotated as "extracellular region" and "lysosome" and "plasma membrane" excluding "extracellular organelle" and "cytoplasmic side of plasma membrane"
comp1, Filters all proteins that are predicted to reside extracellularly.
